hero_description_1: He builds reliable backend systems where
quote_text: For indeed, with hardship (comes) ease, indeed with hardship (comes) ease
about_description_2: I'm a software engineer who focuses on building reliable and scalable backend applications. I enjoy designing systems that are clean, efficient, and dependable in the long run.
about_description_3: Throughout my journey, I've worked on various projects—from developing backend services and improving application performance to integrating modern technologies that support business needs. I'm always excited to learn new tools, frameworks, and best practices in the world of software development.
about_long_1: I'm Akmal Muhammad Pridianto, a software engineer based in Semarang, Indonesia. My focus is backend engineering: distributed services, data-heavy APIs, and the boring infrastructure that keeps them online.
about_long_2: Most of my work happens in Go, Rust, TypeScript, and Laravel. I care about clean boundaries, observability that earns its keep, and shipping software that holds up under real load instead of demo conditions.
about_long_3: Outside of work I read papers on database internals, tinker with self-hosted infra, and slowly chip away at side projects that explore monitoring, payments, and microservices.
contacts_description: If you have other requests or questions, don't hesitate to contact me.
projects_page_subtitle: Everything I have built and shipped, filterable by tech stack.
contacts_page_subtitle: Email is fastest. I read every message.
